# setVideoAtPath(_:completionBlock:)

**Instance Method**

Replaces the video data in receiver with the video at a given URL.

## Declaration

```swift
func setVideoAtPath(_ videoPathURL: URL!, completionBlock: (@Sendable (URL?, (any Error)?) -> Void)!)
```

```swift
func setVideoAtPath(_ videoPathURL: URL!) async throws -> URL?
```

## Parameters

- **videoPathURL**: An URL that specifies the location of video data.
- **completionBlock**: The block invoked after the save operation completes.

If the application is able to edit the asset, the completion block returns the same asset URL as the receiver, because a new asset is not created.

If the application is not able to edit the asset, the completion blocks return a `nil` asset URL and an `ALAssetsLibraryWriteFailedError`.

## Discussion



Before invoking this method, you should check the [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAsset/isEditable] property of the asset to determine whether it is possible to replace the video data.

## Setting New Image and Video Data

- **setImageData(_:metadata:completionBlock:)**: Replaces the image data in the receiver with given image data
